name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans from $100–$50,000 in Memphis, TN, with same-day funding if you apply by noon and acceptance of bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a single branch at 1473 S Trezevant St #23 in Memphis, Tennessee, offering car title loans to local residents. The company markets itself primarily to borrowers who have been turned away elsewhere — explicitly welcoming applicants with bad credit histories and past bankruptcies. Its tagline, 'Sign up by noon, get cash today,' reflects a focus on speed as a core value proposition.

The company provides car title loans ranging from $100 to $50,000, using the borrower's vehicle title as collateral. The process follows three steps: apply online, receive cash while retaining use of your vehicle, and repay the loan to have your title returned. The application is available digitally with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption. Customer service is available by phone at 1-888-903-0217 and email at service@swiftloans.com during business hours (Monday–Friday 9am–7pm, Saturday 10am–5pm).

Customer reviews consistently name a staff member called Alfred as attentive, plain-spoken about loan terms, and patient with first-time borrowers. Reviewers highlight that the application and approval process was straightforward and that the office environment felt professional and welcoming. Competitive rates relative to other regional title loan providers are mentioned across multiple independent reviews.

Swift Title Loans is a workable option for Memphis-area borrowers who own a vehicle and need fast cash but cannot qualify for conventional credit. The core caveat is structural: title loans carry high APRs in most states and put the borrower's vehicle at risk if payments are missed. The company does not publicly disclose its APR or fee schedule on the reviewed page. Borrowers should request full cost-of-credit disclosures before signing. There is no mobile app for payment management, no Sunday hours, and no indication of multi-state availability beyond this Memphis location.
address: 9753 S Post Oak Rd #9, Houston, TX 77096

company_info.headquarters: 9753 S Post Oak Rd #9, Houston, TX 77096

pros: Same-day cash disbursement if application is submitted by noon
Explicitly accepts bad credit and past bankruptcies
Loan range of $100–$50,000 covers both small emergencies and larger needs
Borrower keeps and drives the vehicle during the repayment period
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
Online application secured with 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption
Staff (Alfred) consistently praised for patience and plain-language explanations of terms
cons: APR and fee schedule not disclosed on the reviewed location page
Single physical location — Memphis, TN only; no indication of broader footprint
No mobile app for payment tracking or management (noted in customer reviews)
Title loan structure means vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default
best_for: Memphis, TN residents who own a paid-off or nearly paid-off vehicle
Borrowers with bad credit or prior bankruptcy who cannot access conventional personal loans
People facing a short-term cash emergency who need same-day funding
First-time title loan borrowers who want in-person guidance through the process
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best suited for Memphis residents with a vehicle title who need emergency cash quickly and have been turned down for conventional credit due to bad credit or bankruptcy history. The main caveat is that title loans carry high borrowing costs and the risk of losing your vehicle — Swift does not publicly display its APR, so borrowers must ask for full cost-of-credit disclosures before committing.
services: Keep and drive vehicle during repayment
